wealth_image_subjects.ai_tech: A lone developer surrounded by multiple curved ultrawide monitors displaying code and dashboards in a pitch-black room, neon blue screen glow, cinematic
wealth_image_subjects.server_room: A server corridor with endless blue-lit GPU racks receding to a vanishing point, low mist on the floor, cinematic industrial
wealth_image_subjects.trading: Wall Street trading floor at peak hours, dozens of Bloomberg terminals, motion blur on traders moving fast, overhead dramatic lighting
wealth_image_subjects.trading_screens: Close-up of three curved trading monitors showing upward-trending charts in a dark room, single overhead spotlight, hands on keyboard
wealth_image_subjects.money_wealth: A single stack of crisp $100 bills under a tight spotlight on a matte black surface, deep shadows, ultra macro lens
wealth_image_subjects.portfolio: A hand holding a phone displaying a portfolio chart spiking upward, luxury apartment window behind with city lights defocused at f/1.4
wealth_image_subjects.founder_office: A solitary young founder at a glass desk on the 60th floor of a Manhattan skyscraper at 3am, entire dark city below, single desk lamp
wealth_image_subjects.luxury_car: A matte black Lamborghini Urus parked on a rain-slicked empty street under amber sodium lights, puddle reflections, fog in background
wealth_image_subjects.private_jet: Interior of a private jet looking forward over cream leather seats toward oval windows showing golden hour clouds, cinematic warm grade
wealth_image_subjects.yacht: Aerial drone shot of a superyacht cutting through deep blue Caribbean water at sunset, long wake trail, no people visible

dalle_prompt_modifiers.style: shot on RED Komodo 6K, anamorphic lens, f/1.8 shallow depth of field, ISO 3200 film grain, Kodachrome cinematic color grade, 4K resolution
dalle_prompt_modifiers.lighting: single-source dramatic lighting, deep shadows, strong chiaroscuro contrast, no fill light
dalle_prompt_modifiers.forbidden: absolutely no text, no watermarks, no logos, no UI elements, no solid black rectangles, no blank zones

brand_tone: Gen Z cinematic dark aesthetic. Bold, direct, no fluff. Neon green energy. Psychological urgency. Speaks to young professionals who want financial independence through automation and AI.
